on_screen_text:
Bank of India: + ₹ 2,01,108 Credited to Account 0002
अपने परिवार का सबसे अमीर आदमी बनने के लिए Download कीजिये Zinglish App 😍 [To become the richest person in your family, download the Zinglish App 😍]
Zinglish: English Speaking App
summary: The ad associates learning English with financial success by showing a large stack of cash and a high bank credit notification. It prompts users to download the Zinglish app to become the richest person in their family.
